creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Juraj Lutter from comment #2)

I checked source archives of 3.7.0 and 3.8-20220204 and both of them include my patch. So they should work fine with databases/db18 as they are.

BTW I checked RELEASE_NOTES of 3.7.0 and found Postfix now supports PCRE2. According to the web site of PCRE (https://www.pcre.org/), PCRE1 has reached its EoL. So please consider switching to the former.
